fields.label: Extraction Mode
fields.help: natural = describe what to extract in plain English. css = provide CSS selectors.

fields.label: What to Extract
fields.placeholder: Extract product name, price, rating, and all reviews
fields.help: Describe what you want to extract in plain English.

fields.label: CSS Selectors (JSON)
fields.help: JSON map of field name to CSS selector. Use @attr for attributes: img.hero@src

fields.label: List Selector
fields.help: If set, extracts an array of items matching this selector.
